name: Red,white & Blue American Pie
recipeIngredient: 21 oz Can tart cherry pie filling
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake the 10-inch pie pastry and let it cool to room temperature.
2. Pour the blueberry pie filling into the shell.
3. Refrigerate for 30 minutes.
4. Beat cream cheese with powdered sugar until smooth.
5. Fold in whipped topping.
6. Spread the cream cheese mixture over the blueberry pie filling.
7. Refrigerate for an additional 30 minutes.
8. Spread cherry pie filling over the cream cheese mixture.
9. Refrigerate for at least 4 hours before serving.
10. Yields one 10-inch pie.
